signatures.confidence: PROVEN when reproducible from a second resolver
signatures.safeDiagnostic: Test origin directly with curl --resolve domain:443:ORIGIN_IP; check public resolution separately (dig/other network). Report ORIGIN_HEALTHY_PUBLIC_DNS_PENDING when they diverge.
signatures.prohibitedAction: Any application, artifact, or database change; treating --resolve success as public-DNS health.
signatures.ownerActionRequired: Only if nameserver/DNS records need changing at the registrar.

signatures.signature: HTTP 404 with concatenated path such as /api/healthcurl
signatures.confidence: PROVEN by inspecting the echoed URL
signatures.safeDiagnostic: Re-issue as a single-line command or heredoc; validate the URL before execution; use curl --fail-with-body -o file -w %{http_code}.
signatures.prohibitedAction: Diagnosing the application from a malformed request; asking the owner for more diagnostics.

signatures.signature: HTTP 500 with empty or generic body from /api/health
signatures.safeDiagnostic: 1) Read-only DB check with exact production DATABASE_URL + bundled engine (scripts/db-inspect.mjs). 2) Direct app start with captured stderr in an isolated shell. Narrow the layer before any change.
signatures.prohibitedAction: Bootstrap, seed, migrate, or replace the database; config guesses presented as fixes.
signatures.rollbackTrigger: If a fresh deploy caused it: yes, code-only rollback.
signatures.ownerActionRequired: No — automation exhausts safe diagnostics first.

signatures.signature: Cannot find module '@prisma/client-<hex>' (Failed to load external module)
signatures.safeDiagnostic: Confirm via receipt.json bundler field and the unresolved-external scan. Rebuild with next build --webpack; re-prove in true isolation.
signatures.prohibitedAction: npm install on shared hosting; symlink hacks as permanent fix; touching the database.
signatures.rollbackTrigger: Yes — roll back to last-known-good code release.
signatures.ownerActionRequired: Replace code release with the fixed artifact (one block).

signatures.signature: Prisma Client could not locate the Query Engine / generated for X but required Y
signatures.safeDiagnostic: Verify the engine file exists in node_modules/.prisma/client; pin PRISMA_QUERY_ENGINE_LIBRARY to the rhel-openssl-1.1.x engine (app.js self-sets it).
signatures.prohibitedAction: prisma generate on the server; database changes.
signatures.ownerActionRequired: Only if the env var must be added in cPanel UI.

signatures.signature: The table main.<Model> does not exist in the current database
signatures.safeDiagnostic: Read-only scripts/db-inspect.mjs. If schema-empty AND backed up: install the build-verified schema template via bootstrap-production-db.sh. If nonempty with unknown tables: HARD STOP.
signatures.prohibitedAction: prisma db push/migrate on the server; --force-reset; deleting a nonempty database.

signatures.signature: database file missing or zero bytes at $DATA_DIR/prod.db
signatures.safeDiagnostic: First deploy: bootstrap installs the schema template (with backup rules). Established production: HARD STOP — locate backups (prod.db.bak-*), never regenerate silently.
signatures.prohibitedAction: Silent regeneration over a previously-populated production path.
signatures.ownerActionRequired: Confirm whether this is a first deploy.

signatures.signature: restart script path not found (sh: restart.sh: No such file)
signatures.safeDiagnostic: Stable wrappers live at ~/apps/orderweeddc/{restart,rollback}.sh (installed by deploy.sh); release-local copies at current/. Command-path consistency test guards agreement.
signatures.prohibitedAction: Publishing further paths without executing them against the artifact layout.

signatures.signature: cPanel Terminal session ended / websocket dropped
signatures.safeDiagnostic: Check application health independently via the health endpoint before any conclusion.
signatures.prohibitedAction: Declaring an outage; restarting the app reflexively.
signatures.ownerActionRequired: Reopen Terminal if more commands are needed.

signatures.confidence: LIKELY provider-side when reproducible on cp.namecheaphosting.com
signatures.safeDiagnostic: Probe Namecheap's own hosting domains; test origin via --resolve. If provider-wide: wait / open a Namecheap ticket.
signatures.prohibitedAction: Application or artifact changes to fix a host-side outage.

signatures.signature: TLS handshake failure / certificate invalid on apex or www
signatures.safeDiagnostic: Check cPanel SSL/TLS Status; trigger AutoSSL; verify DNS points at the hosting; retry via http origin check meanwhile.
signatures.prohibitedAction: Disabling HSTS or shipping mixed-content workarounds.
